purpose: Document how Earth on Minecraft should cooperate with Xxsx Smart Core's world-height UI without hard-linking Java classes.
rules: Default generated worlds stay at vanilla 26.2 height unless the player explicitly selects a new-world preset or config route.
Earth on Minecraft may read Smart Core's height multiplier as a hint, but must still validate the active world's dimension type and not assume the value was applied.
When height changes, every placed_feature height band must be retuned as a set.
